summary: Frontend testing of 3 major changes: 1) Unified 'Partage de Donnees' page with 3 tabs replacing separate nav items, 2) Registration step 2 with new role categories (Provincial, Etablissement, Central), 3) Role-based navigation for admin. All features working correctly.

issues: Navigation items may be truncated on smaller screens due to horizontal scrolling - minor UX issue

passed_tests: Login as admin (admin@educonnect.cd) - successful
Dashboard nav shows 'Partage de Donnees' item for administrateur_technique role
'Cles API' is NOT a separate nav item (correct - unified into Partage de Donnees)
'APIs Externes' is NOT a separate nav item (correct - unified into Partage de Donnees)

All expected nav items visible for admin: Dashboard, Documents, Rapports, Provinces, Enseignants, Eleves, Etablissements, Viabilite, Classes, Presences, Paie, Tests, Partage de Donnees, Controle DINACOPE, Mutations, Planning Controles
Navigate to /dashboard/partage-donnees - page loads correctly
Partage de Donnees page shows info banner explaining how it works
3 tabs present: Sources de Donnees, Endpoints d'Ingestion, Cles API
Sources de Donnees tab (default) shows 4 sources: Gestion Scolaire, Tests et Evaluations, SECOPE, DINACOPE
Each source card shows: name, description, types of data, status badge, endpoint
Status legend shows: Connectee (green), Simulation (amber), En attente (gray)
Endpoints d'Ingestion tab shows 4 API endpoints with documentation
Endpoints: POST /api/externe/presences, /evaluations, /effectifs, /etablissement
Each endpoint shows: method, path, description, authentication, example body
Cles API tab shows API key management interface with stats and generate button
Registration page step 1 (/inscription) - form loads correctly
Step 1 form accepts: nom, prenom, date_naissance, lieu_naissance, telephone, adresse, password, confirm_password
Step 1 submission creates user and navigates to step 2
Registration step 2 shows 3 category buttons: Poste Provincial, Poste en Etablissement, Administration Centrale
Poste Provincial shows 4 roles: PROVED, IPP, DIPROCOPE, Ministre Provincial
Each provincial role shows label and description
Selecting PROVED shows province admin selector
Poste en Etablissement shows 4 roles: Chef d'Etablissement (Secondaire), Directeur d'Ecole (Primaire), CPE, Enseignant
Administration Centrale shows 3 roles: Personnel Administratif, Inspecteur Pedagogique, Agent DINACOPE
Administration Centrale shows organigramme section for service selection
Backend models.py has all new roles defined in UserRole enum
context_for_next_testing_agent: Three major features tested and working: 1) Partage de Donnees unified page at /dashboard/partage-donnees with 3 tabs (Sources de Donnees, Endpoints d'Ingestion, Cles API). 2) Registration step 2 at /inscription with 3 role categories (Provincial with 4 roles + province selectors, Etablissement with 4 roles, Central with 3 roles + organigramme). 3) Role-based navigation in Layout.jsx using getNavItems() function. Admin credentials: admin@educonnect.cd / Admin@EduConnect2026!
